name: George Abbott
abstract: George Francis Abbott (June 25, 1887 – January 31, 1995) was an American theatre producer, director, playwright, screenwriter, film director and producer whose career spanned eight decades. He received numerous honors including six Tony Awards, the Pulitzer Prize, the Kennedy Center Honors in 1982, the National Medal of Arts in 1990, and…

concerts.label: Give My Regards to Broadway – A Salute to 125 Years of Musical Theater

about_quotes.speaker: Manny Albam
about_quotes.evidence: And I worked with George Abbott, Mr. Broadway, a great director and all that. And I wrote this great arrangement for one of the singers in the show
about_quotes.doc_title: Manny Albam interviewed by Monk Rowe, Tarrytown, New York, October 31, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Louis Barbarin
about_quotes.evidence: You all hear George Abbott. You know George Abbott, played with Kid Puncher Band, clarinet player too.
